_note: Archetype definition (data). A seed plus this template defines one scenario instance; the eval predicate shapes below are bound to that instance's concrete IDs.
invariants: exactly one blocker sits on the critical path to the launch deadline
the blocker clears only AFTER the deadline — that ordering is the conflict
the critical blocker is known_to exactly one active-tier NPC at seed, surfaced=false
at least one action sequence flips surfaced=true within the sim-week
blocker.surfaced has NO agent write path — it flips only when the holder reveals it

time.convention: all times are offsets D<day>T<HH:MM> from t0 (D1 = first working day); the runtime assigns the absolute clock — never calendar dates

blocker.holder.sample_from: active npcs where role in [backend, fullstack, sre]

discovery.hops.on_2: add a pointer-holder NPC who names the holder but not the fact (coupled discovery)

distractor_blockers.note: red herrings that look critical but aren't

stakeholder.sample_from: active npcs where role in [cto, pm]

example_binding._note: A concrete slot draw, for illustration.
